basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Senior Project Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./Master's degree in the relevant area
qualification.details: Ph.D./Master's degree in the relevant area/technical skills in specified area.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or Master's degree in the relevant area, along with technical skills in the specified area.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Senior Project Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via Email.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Executive Officer position.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: IIT Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.
